item.name: Flaming Eel
item.description:
Sought more for its oil than for its meat, which is─as one might expect─rather oily.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Should it be exposed to fire, this oily eel will burn quite readily, the flaming pattern on its skin soon replaced by actual flames. It is prized among seafarers as a substitute fuel for cooking, and for the surfeit of fish oil which can be extracted from its flesh.
